notes: Russian Relikt ERA (NII Stali). Improved over Kontakt-5: ~1.8-2.2x vs KE (APFSDS), ~2.5-3.0x vs HEAT. Multi-layer design with enhanced flyer plate velocity. Better performance against advanced APFSDS (M829A3, DM63 class). Tandem charge resistance is moderate. BHN not directly applicable for ERA — value is placeholder. SpallCoeff high: ERA generates significant backplane spall.
